content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Daily Update (Apr 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 29, 2026, focused on architectural cleanup and improving runtime error handling across the ElizaOS ecosystem. While no direct feature commits were made to the `plugin-telegram` repository, significant progress was made in resolving cross-package dependencies, refining LLM provider configuration feedback, and optimizing Telegram-related messaging flows within the broader framework.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Runtime Error Handling & UX**
    *   Implemented a new `NoModelProviderConfiguredError` class to provide actionable feedback when agents are booted without a configured LLM provider.
    *   Updated `DefaultMessageService` to short-circuit structured failure replies with specific hints when no text-generation handlers are available.
*   **Architectural Decoupling**
    *   Refactored `@elizaos/agent` to remove hard dependencies on `app-*` packages by migrating route registration to the existing plugin-lifecycle system.
    *   Successfully reduced the import graph of the main server, improving the "standalone backend" architecture.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   **Runtime & Configuration Improvements**
    *   [#7203](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/issues/7203): Resolved opaque error messages by introducing a typed error for missing LLM providers.
    *   [#7204](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/issues/7204): Addressed hard-coded imports in the agent server by migrating routes to the plugin-lifecycle registry.
*   **Dependency & Cleanup**
    *   [#7202](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/issues/7202): Cleaned up dangling imports resulting from the deletion of re-export shims.
*   **Telegram Messaging Logic**
    *   [#7009](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/issues/7009): Optimized read receipt logic in the LifeOps Telegram client to use direct message ID fetching instead of nested lookups.

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Build Configuration**
    *   [#28](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/issues/28): Identified a discrepancy where the `package.json` subpath export for `./account-auth-service` is declared but not emitted by the current `tsup` configuration.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
